title: T6: Pending entry self-containedness (proposed_reason + Session context + Evidence dedup)
description: Make pending entries reviewable by future-self without conversation transcript access. Q-8 resolved: current pending lacks 'why was this proposed' and 'what session goal was'. Three additions: (1) Frontmatter `proposed_reason: <enum>` where enum is one of `explicit-user-mark` / `diagnostic-then-fix` / `decision-confirmation` / `wrong-turn-revert` / `new-dependency-or-pattern` / `dismissal-with-reason`. (2) Body `## Why proposed` (one-line enum explanation). (3) Body `## Session context` (3-5 lines: session goal + key turning point). Also fix extract-knowledge.ts Evidence-merge bug: when same idempotency_key arrives, MERGE Evidence call notes rather than appending duplicate bodies (current sample shows 3× identical Notes blocks).

files.change: extend input schema: require `proposed_reason` (enum) and `session_context` (string, 3-5 lines markdown)

write `## Why proposed` (1 line from enum lookup) + `## Session context` (passthrough from input) to pending body; emit `proposed_reason` to frontmatter; on idempotency_key collision, merge new Evidence notes into existing entry's `## Evidence` section (dedup by note text) instead of appending duplicate bodies

update extract step to pass `proposed_reason` (Skill infers from classification: model→decision-confirmation, pitfall→wrong-turn-revert, etc.) + `session_context` (3-5 line summary from Phase 0.0 cross-session digest)
update extract step similarly: `proposed_reason: 'new-dependency-or-pattern'` (default for git-log mining) + `session_context: 'Imported from git log analysis of commits <hash range>'`
review-list step renders proposed_reason + Why proposed line + Session context in batch review UI so future-self has full context
test Evidence-merge on idempotency_key collision (no duplicate ## Notes blocks); test new frontmatter+body fields are written
verify pending entries contain proposed_reason frontmatter + ## Why proposed + ## Session context sections

implementation: Define proposed_reason enum + 1-line description mapping table in schema file (e.g., diagnostic-then-fix → '诊断过程发现新模式或踩坑')
Update Zod schema for extract-knowledge.ts input: add proposed_reason (enum) and session_context (string with minLength check)
Update fab_extract_knowledge.ts body builder to emit Why proposed + Session context sections in fixed order

Implement Evidence-merge: when reading existing pending file (idempotency collision), parse ## Evidence section, deduplicate against incoming notes by text-match, emit merged section; preserve existing frontmatter unchanged
Update each Skill (archive/import/review) to pass new required fields; provide sensible defaults per Skill semantics
Verify pending file rendering still parses cleanly through review Skill

reference.pattern: Existing pending frontmatter shape (rc.5) — extend with new required field; existing pending body sections — append new sections in fixed order
reference.examples: Current pending body order: ## Summary / ## Notes (evidence). New order: ## Summary / ## Why proposed / ## Session context / ## Evidence (renamed from Notes)

criteria: GIVEN fab_extract_knowledge called with proposed_reason='diagnostic-then-fix' and session_context='Investigating 401 errors → discovered missing auth header' WHEN pending file is written THEN frontmatter contains `proposed_reason: diagnostic-then-fix` AND body has `## Why proposed` followed by `## Session context` sections in that order
GIVEN fab_extract_knowledge called WITHOUT proposed_reason or session_context THEN Zod validation rejects with a clear error message

GIVEN fab_extract_knowledge called twice with the same idempotency_key with 2 different Evidence notes THEN pending file has exactly ONE ## Evidence section containing both notes (no duplicate ## Notes/## Evidence blocks)
GIVEN fabric-review Skill renders pending list THEN each entry's display includes the Why proposed line + first line of Session context

rationale.chosen_approach: Enum-categorized reason + free-form session context + section-merge dedup — enum is greppable/lintable, free-form context absorbs nuance, merge fixes the actual data-quality bug
alternatives_considered: Inline full transcript instead of digest
decision_factors: Q-8 future-self reviewability requires both structured reason AND narrative context
Enum enables future v2.1 maturity-promotion scoring (Grill #1 deferred)
Merge fixes a current observable bug (3× duplicate Notes blocks)
rationale.tradeoffs: Required new fields are breaking for any external caller of fab_extract_knowledge — accepted, no users yet (pre-user clean-slate per memory)

manual_checks: Run fabric-import on a real repo → inspect pending entries → verify all have proposed_reason + Why proposed + Session context
Trigger idempotency_key collision (re-run extract) → verify single Evidence section
success_metrics: 100% of post-T6 pending entries have proposed_reason + new sections
Zero duplicate ## Evidence/## Notes blocks in any pending file
unit: Body builder emits sections in fixed order
integration: End-to-end: extract → idempotent re-extract → assert merged Evidence + preserved frontmatter
